ddls:
CREATE TABLE "emission_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each emissions data entry */,
  "operator_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp indicating when the data was collected */,
  "plume_length" TEXT /* Length of the emissions plume (if applicable) */,
  "facility_emission_rate" REAL /* Rate of emissions from the facility */,
  "facility_emission_rate_upper" REAL /* Upper bound of the emission rate */,
  "facility_emission_rate_lower" REAL /* Lower bound of the emission rate */,
  "uncertainty_type" TEXT /* Type of uncertainty associated with the measurement */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed during measurement */,
  "wind_direction" TEXT /* Direction of the wind */,
  "transit_direction" TEXT /* Direction of transit */,
  "satellite_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the satellite used for measurement */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the facility */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the facility */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the facility */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the facility */,
  "emission_type" TEXT /* Type of emission (e.g., CO2, CH4) */,
  "measurement_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the measurement */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., satellite, ground-based sensor) */,
  "atmospheric_pressure" REAL /* Atmospheric pressure during measurement */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity during measurement */,
  "cloud_cover" TEXT /* Cloud cover during measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emission_data_transit_direction FOREIGN KEY ("transit_direction") REFERENCES transit_directions ("direction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emission_data_satellite_id FOREIGN KEY ("satellite_id") REFERENCES satellites ("satellite_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emission_data_uncertainty_type FOREIGN KEY ("uncertainty_type") REFERENCES uncertainty_types ("uncertainty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "satellites" (
  "satellite_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each satellite */,
  "satellite_name" TEXT /* Name of the satellite */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team responsible for the satellite */,
  "satellite_model" TEXT /* Model of the satellite */,
  "launch_date" TEXT /* Date the satellite was launched */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the satellite */,
  "orbital_period" REAL /* Orbital period of the satellite in minutes */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of sensor used on the satellite */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("satellite_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "emission_rates" (
  "rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each emission rate record */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the emissions data entry */,
  "cr_quad_scfh" REAL /* Calculated value for the specific emission rate */,
  "pipe_size_inch" INTEGER /* Size of the pipe in inches */,
  "meter_code" TEXT /* Meter code used for measurements */,
  "cr_scfh_mean300" REAL /* Mean value for emission rate at 300 seconds */,
  "cr_scfh_mean600" REAL /* Mean value for emission rate at 600 seconds */,
  "cr_kgh_CH4_mean300" REAL /* Mean value of CH4 emissions rate at 300 seconds */,
  "cr_kgh_CH4_lower300" REAL /* Lower bound of CH4 emissions rate at 300 seconds */,
  "cr_kgh_CH4_upper300" REAL /* Upper bound of CH4 emissions rate at 300 seconds */,
  "cr_kgh_CH4_mean600" REAL /* Mean value of CH4 emissions rate at 600 seconds */,
  "cr_kgh_CH4_lower600" REAL /* Lower bound of CH4 emissions rate at 600 seconds */,
  "cr_kgh_CH4_upper600" REAL /* Upper bound of CH4 emissions rate at 600 seconds */,
  "measurement_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the measurement in seconds */,
  "measurement_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of measurement in Hz */,
  "measurement_method" TEXT /* Method used for measurement */,
  "confidence_interval" REAL /* Confidence interval for the measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emission_rates_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES emission_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "uncertainty_types" (
  "uncertainty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each uncertainty type */,
  "uncertainty_description" TEXT /* Description of the uncertainty type */,
  "uncertainty_source" TEXT /* Source of the uncertainty */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("uncertainty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wind_conditions" (
  "wind_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wind condition record */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the emissions data entry */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed recorded during the emissions data collection */,
  "wind_direction" TEXT /* Direction of the wind during the data collection */,
  "wind_gust" REAL /* Maximum wind gust recorded during the measurement */,
  "wind_stability" TEXT /* Stability of the wind */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wind_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wind_conditions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES emission_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transit_directions" (
  "direction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transit direction */,
  "direction_name" TEXT /* Description of the direction (e.g., 'north', 'south') */,
  "direction_angle" REAL /* Angle of the direction in degrees */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("direction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login timestamp */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
